_README: SpaceCraft Planner data, extracted directly from the game's CastleDB (res.pak / data.cdb), build 23703823, on 2026-06-12. value = base shop sell price (credits). inputs/outputQty/building/category/craftTime/power are the real in-game craft recipe. type is a display bucket (raw/refined/component/product). alts = alternate recipes for the same item. Crafting costs power + time (not credits), so craftTax is 0.
